description: This pipeline processes image data by converting region of interest lists to masks and then outputs the resulting overlay, allowing for the creation of visual representations of annotated image data based on grouped input information.

118a44a9-bde7-45a1-9b7f-7a337d0ec7df.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
118a44a9-bde7-45a1-9b7f-7a337d0ec7df.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
